Title: Create New Internship Group with Valid Information
Objective: Verify functionality for creating a new internship group when entering all required and valid information.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Internship Management interface.
Classes "PNV26A" and "PNV26B" exist in system and are not assigned to any internship group in the same academic year.
TestData: GroupName="Internship Group 2026"; AcademicYear="2026"; Classes="PNV26A, PNV26B"; StartDate="2026-06-01"
ExpectedResult:
Internship group is created successfully.
Success notification appears and "Internship Group 2026" is displayed in the active internship group list with 2 assigned classes.

Title: Internship Group Creation Fails Due to Empty Group Name
Objective: Verify system displays error and prevents creating internship group when group name is blank.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Create New Internship Group interface.
Class "PNV26A" is not assigned to any internship group in the academic year.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks creation.
Validation error message appears: "Group Name is required."
Form remains open and no new record is created.
Notes: Related Requirement: M05-F01, Rule 6.1, Validation Rules (Section 8)

Title: Internship Group Creation Fails Due to Unselected Classes
Objective: Verify system displays error and prevents creating internship group when no classes are selected.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Create New Internship Group interface.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks creation.
Validation error message appears: "At least one class must be selected."
Group is not created.
Notes: Related Requirement: M05-F01, Rule 6.1, Validation Rules (Section 8)

Title: Internship Group Creation Fails Due to Missing Start Date
Objective: Verify system displays error and prevents creating internship group when Start Date is empty.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Create New Internship Group interface.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks creation.
Validation error message appears: "Start Date is required."
Group is not created.
Notes: Related Requirement: M05-F01, Rule 6.1, Validation Rules (Section 8)

Title: Internship Group Creation Fails Due to Missing Academic Year
Objective: Verify system displays error and prevents creating internship group when Academic Year is empty.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Create New Internship Group interface.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks creation.
Validation error message appears: "Academic Year is required."
Group is not created.
Notes: Related Requirement: M05-F01, Rule 6.1, Validation Rules (Section 8)

Title: Create Internship Group Successfully When Assigning Same Class across Different Academic Years
Objective: Verify system allows assigning the same class to another internship group if the academic years are different.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Class "PNV26A" was assigned to an internship group in academic year 2025.
ExpectedResult: System allows creation successfully without duplicate class error because academic years differ (2025 vs 2026).

Title: Add New Partner Company with Valid Name
Objective: Verify functionality for adding a new partner company with a valid name.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Currently on Company Management interface.

Company "ABC Technology" does not exist in system.
ExpectedResult:
Company is added successfully.

Success notification appears and "ABC Technology" is displayed in company list with status Active.

Title: Add Company Fails Due to Empty Company Name
Objective: Verify system displays error and prevents adding company when company name is empty.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Currently on Add Company dialog.
Steps:
1. Leave Company Name field empty;

2. Click Save button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.

Validation error message appears: "Company Name is required."

No new company is saved.
Notes: Related Requirement: M05-F03, Rule 6.3, Validation Rules (Section 8)

Title: Add Company Fails Due to Duplicate Name (Case Insensitive)
Objective: Verify system detects duplicate company names regardless of uppercase/lowercase letters.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Company "ABC Technology" already exists in system.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.

Error message appears: "Company name already exists."

Duplicate company is not created.

Title: Add Company Fails Due to Duplicate Name with Leading/Trailing Whitespace
Objective: Verify system trims leading and trailing spaces before checking for duplicate company names.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Company "ABC Technology" already exists in system.
ExpectedResult:
System trims spaces, detects duplicate "ABC Technology", and displays error: "Company name already exists."

Save is rejected.

Title: Assign Internship to Individual Student
Objective: Verify functionality for assigning an internship company to a single student.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Currently on Student List in Internship Group.

Student "Nguyen Van A" has no assigned company.

Company "ABC Technology" exists in system.
ExpectedResult:
Assignment saved successfully.

Student "Nguyen Van A" displays company "ABC Technology" in the table list.

Title: Batch Assign Internship to Multiple Students
Objective: Verify functionality for assigning an internship company to multiple selected students simultaneously.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Currently on Student List in Internship Group.

Students "Nguyen Van A" and "Tran Thi B" have no assigned company.
TestData: SelectedStudents=["Nguyen Van A", "Tran Thi B"]; AssignedCompany="ABC Technology"
ExpectedResult:
Batch assignment saved successfully.

Both students "Nguyen Van A" and "Tran Thi B" display company "ABC Technology" in the list.

Title: Change Student Assigned Company
Objective: Verify functionality for updating the assigned internship company for a student.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Student "Nguyen Van A" is currently assigned to "ABC Technology".
ExpectedResult:
Assignment updated successfully.

Student "Nguyen Van A" displays new company "XYZ Global".

Title: Unassign Company from Student by Selecting No Company
Objective: Verify functionality for removing an assigned company from a student by selecting "No Company".
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Student "Nguyen Van A" is currently assigned to "ABC Technology".
ExpectedResult:
Company assignment cleared successfully.

Student "Nguyen Van A" displays "Unassigned" or "No Company" in student list.

Title: Hide Company and Verify Exclusion from New Assignment Options
Objective: Verify system hides company from assignment dropdowns when company status is set to Hidden/Inactive.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Company "Defunct Corp" exists in system.
ExpectedResult: Company "Defunct Corp" no longer appears in dropdown list for new student assignments.

Title: Ensure Existing Student Assignment Remains Unaffected When Company Is Hidden
Objective: Verify hiding a company does not remove or distort historical/existing student assignments associated with that company.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Student "Tran Thi B" is assigned to company "ABC Technology".
Steps:
1. Change status of company "ABC Technology" to Hidden in Company Management;

2. View Student List in Internship Group.
ExpectedResult:
Assignment of student "Tran Thi B" still displays "ABC Technology" normally in student list.

No error notification appears and existing assignment is preserved.

Title: Record Internship Feedback Successfully for Student by Training Team
Objective: Verify functionality for recording internship feedback for a student by Training team.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Currently on Student List in Internship Group.

Student "Nguyen Van A" has assigned internship.
TestData: StudentName="Nguyen Van A"; FeedbackTeam="Training"; FeedbackDate="2026-08-15"; FeedbackNotes="Good progress, proactive in assigned tasks."
ExpectedResult:
Feedback saved successfully.

New feedback entry appears under student name with Team "Training", date, and entered notes.

Title: Record Internship Feedback Successfully for Student by ERO Team
Objective: Verify functionality for recording internship feedback for a student by ERO team.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Currently on Student List in Internship Group.

Student "Nguyen Van A" has assigned internship.
TestData: StudentName="Nguyen Van A"; FeedbackTeam="ERO"; FeedbackNotes="Strong technical skills and professional attitude."
ExpectedResult:
Feedback saved successfully.

New feedback entry appears under student name with Team "ERO", and entered notes.

Title: Record Internship Feedback Successfully for Student by Educators Team
Objective: Verify functionality for recording internship feedback for a student by Educators team.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Currently on Student List in Internship Group.

Student "Nguyen Van A" has assigned internship.
TestData: StudentName="Nguyen Van A"; FeedbackTeam="Educators";  FeedbackNotes="Actively contributes constructive ideas to group."
ExpectedResult:
Feedback saved successfully.

New feedback entry appears under student name with Team "Educators", and entered notes.

Title: Ignore Blank Feedback Entries Without Saving
Objective: Verify system ignores and does not save feedback entries when feedback notes field is empty.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Currently on Add Feedback dialog for student.
ExpectedResult:
System ignores blank feedback entry without saving new database record.

No error appears and no empty feedback row is displayed on UI.

Title: Record Batch Feedback for Multiple Students Simultaneously (Same for All)
Objective: Verify batch feedback feature applies identical feedback content to multiple selected students.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Currently on Student List in Internship Group.

At least 2 students selected (e.g., Nguyen Van A, Tran Thi B).
TestData: SelectedStudents=["Nguyen Van A", "Tran Thi B"]; FeedbackTeam="Educators"; FeedbackNotes="Excellent communication skills."
ExpectedResult:
Feedback saved successfully for both students.

Both "Nguyen Van A" and "Tran Thi B" display Educators feedback.

Title: Edit Saved Internship Feedback Content
Objective: Verify functionality for editing and saving existing feedback content.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Student "Nguyen Van A" has feedback: Team = "Training", content = "Good progress", date = "2026-08-15".
TestData: StudentName="Nguyen Van A"; NewFeedbackNotes="Outstanding progress and excellent teamwork."
ExpectedResult:
Feedback updated successfully.

New content overwrites previous notes and displays correctly on UI: "Outstanding progress and excellent teamwork.".

Title: Edit Saved Internship Feedback Team and Date
Objective: Verify functionality for editing and saving existing feedback team and date.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.

Student "Nguyen Van A" has feedback: Team = "Training", content = "Good progress", date = "2026-08-15".
ExpectedResult:
Feedback updated successfully.

Feedback details update on UI to display new Team "ERO".
